items.title: Penrith Panthers player Casey McLean faces suspension for high tackle in loss to Canterbury
items.summary: Penrith centre Casey McLean is facing a one-week suspension for a high shot that left Canterbury prop Max King with a broken jaw.

items.title: Hills Shire Mayor leads calls to simplify governance of Hawkesbury River
items.summary: The Hawkesbury-Nepean River flows through eight NSW council areas and is looked after by 13 agencies, which one mayor says leads to confusion about who is in charge of what.

items.title: Man charged after $1.1 million of diesel fuel allegedly stolen from unmanned Queensland depots over 12 months
items.summary: Police will allege a 48-year-old man used stolen fuel cards to obtain the diesel from unmanned depots over a 12-month period.

items.title: Inside the secret Pakistan talks that brokered the fragile Iran war ceasefire

items.summary: Monegasque star Valentin Vacherot is next on the docket for Australian Alex de Minaur after an impressive win over rising star Alexander Blockx.

items.title: Cheat Sheet: Charting Euphoria's long and messy road to season three
items.summary: Sam Levinson's controversial teen series has had to overcome four years of actor deaths, character departures and on-set tension to make it to season three.

items.title: Truck driver charged over Sunshine Coast crash that killed three-year-old girl

items.title: Search for missing Murwillumbah woman Yvonne Whear continues in northern NSW
items.summary: The daughter of Yvonne Whear, 73, who went missing in February, says there is no evidence to suggest her mum left her northern NSW home of her own accord.

items.title: ASX 200 and Aussie dollar down, Brent crude and WTI oil up — as it happened

items.title: Mark Gregory's mum just wants to know what happened to her son 35 years ago

items.title: Southern Queensland farmers take pre-emptive action as dry spell stretches on

items.title: Study finds Tasmanian native forest logging increases potential for more severe bushfires

items.title: How the Parkes Dish is helping track Artemis II on its historic journey
items.summary: The Parkes Observatory — also known as The Dish — continues a legacy of supporting lunar missions that started more than 50 years ago, helping Artemis II go where humanity has not since 1972.

items.title: Tiwi Island birder hopes rare photos of endemic owl encourage conservation
items.summary: A traditional owner on a Northern Australian island has captured rare photos of an "enchanting" masked owl, adding to the limited knowledge base surrounding the endemic and culturally significant bird.

items.title: NSW drug diversion scheme disproportionately sends Aboriginal people to court, report says

items.title: How the PM's Singapore visit could help Australia's fuel supply

items.summary: An internal police investigation is underway, after video footage emerged online showing a police officer pushing a woman to the ground in Western Australia's far north.

items.title: King Charles praises Territorians, warns of climate change dangers in open letter on 'devastating' NT wet season
items.summary: King Charles has written an open letter to Northern Territory residents following recent devastating flooding, saying the "increasingly catastrophic effects of climate change are surely a siren-call to the world for more urgent action".

items.summary: Our "ordinary understanding" of de facto relationships may not match up with the legal definition and that can cause big surprises for people in the event of a break-up.

items.summary: As a shaky ceasefire struggles to get under way, deadly Israeli strikes on Lebanon risk worsening the Middle East conflict.

items.title: People living in vehicles forced to choose between diesel and food as fuel prices remain high
